DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF GIL ASIDO'S MOTION TO QUASH DEPOSITION SUBPOENA AND OR FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER RE: DEPOSITION SUBPOENA FOR BUSINESS RECORDS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. PLAINTIFF IS TO HAVE A FIRST LOOK AT ALL DOCUMENTS TO BE PRODUCED. DEFENSE COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND SUBMIT IT TO JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN STEIN FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Morgan Yang, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed with prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-06-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-10-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Continued To Sep-09-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2018 Continued To May-13-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2018 Set For Trial On Jan-28-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena And Or For Protective Order Re: Deposition Subpoena For Business Records
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeremy Pasternak, Esq. of Law Offices of Jeremy Pasternak, Tel. 415.693.0300, appearing for plaintiff/moving party Gil Asido;
Joe Lake, Deputy City Attorney - Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.4217, appearing for defendant/opposing party City and County of San Francisco.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein.

Matter called, argument held.

At the conclusion of argument, Plaintiff Gil Asido's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena And Or For Protective Order Re: Deposition Subpoena For Business Records is Granted in Part and Denied in Part. Plaintiff is to have a first look at all documents to be produced. Defense counsel is to prepare a form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and submit it to Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein for review and signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (302/JPT)
